description: Jen Psaki tackles the issues of the week and features one-on-one interviews with newsmakers.

description: A master thief (Mark Wahlberg) and his crew plan to steal back a fortune in gold bullion after they lose it to a double-crossing gang member (Edward Norton).

name: The Sleepover
description: A devoted mother is found shot to death in her minivan; the case stays cold until old memories resurface and new revelations come to light, dividing her Florida family.

description: King of Pirates Henry Every's $400M heist and disappearance; the palace harem's conspiracy behind Pharaoh Ramesses III's death; new evidence about the mythical Amazon warriors' existence.
